title: feuilleea microcarpa
intro: Feuilleea microcarpa, also known as the Chinese goldthread or Cang Er Zi, is a plant species belonging to the genus Coptis in the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Feuilleea microcarpa include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. Feuilleea microcarpa is often prepared as a decoction or powder and can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas and capsules.
